summary: Frontend-only test pass for indigo/violet polish iteration. Verified loader/palette, hero compactness, interactive 'SAHIL' name with mouse-distance reactivity, NO Stats card, About copy, Skills chips (4 rows, no PostgreSQL/Docker), Projects with Problem/Solution/Impact and toggle, Achievements as <ul> list (no cards), Education timeline with 2 entries, Contact 4-link list with mailto + new-tab links, Footer copy, palette enforcement (body #09090B, section-tag dots #A78BFA), and smooth-scroll nav. All assertions passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav.jsx still has a stale boxShadow rgba(59,130,246,...) (blue) on scrolled state inline style — visually subtle but contradicts the indigo-only mandate. Recommend swapping to rgba(99,102,241,...) or rgba(79,70,229,...).

Hero interactive letter listener attaches a global window mousemove and runs per-frame layout work (getBoundingClientRect for each letter on every mousemove). Consider throttling or using requestAnimationFrame for performance polish (non-blocking).
Both project-toggle-{id} and project-expand-{id} use independent setOpen handlers but share the same useState; correctly toggles the same state — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified all requirements from the indigo/violet polish review request. Key verified data-testids: portfolio-root, glass-nav, nav-link-{home,about,skills,projects,contact}, nav-resume-btn, hero-section, hero-name (5 .hero-letter + 1 .hero-period), hero-projects-cta/hero-contact-cta/hero-resume/hero-github/hero-linkedin, about-section, skills-section, skill-group-0..3, projects-section, project-card-{hackquest25,orchestratex,rag-ai-agent,slm-debug,phishing-ml}, project-toggle-{id}, project-expand-{id}, project-github-{id}, achievements-section, achievement-{hackquest,nptel,ship}, education-section, edu-0/edu-1 (edu-2 absent confirmed), contact-section, contact-{email,github,linkedin,resume}, site-footer. Interactive name needs page.mouse.move(x, y, steps=N>=10) or window dispatch of MouseEvent to trigger the listener (single mouse.move call may not register in headless).

verified_assertions.hero_buttons_targets_and_urls: all 5 correct (Resume/GitHub/LinkedIn open in new tab)
